g.text: Raspberry Pi (2.5A) + Screw Terminal HAT | 1000-2200uF 10V cap on 5V input
PCA9685 16-Ch PWM Driver | VCC: 5V | V+: not connected
Arm Fuse Board (x2, one per arm)
10x Limit Switches | GPIO 4-6, 17, 22-27 | Pi pull-ups, 22 AWG
GND Bus Bar (250A, 5/16" stud) | PSU GND -> 16 AWG -> bus bar | 16 AWG to each fuse board | 18 AWG to each buck | 12 AWG to MACE ESC
16 AWG (fork connectors from PSU screw terminals)
